title: AI Muscular
description: Makes only the identified people in a photo look naturally more muscular and athletic.
positive_prompt: Make only the people explicitly identified as transformation targets in the accompanying context or instructions look naturally more muscular and athletic. Leave every untargeted person completely unchanged. Increase the targeted subjects' muscle definition and body mass proportionally, especially in the visible arms, shoulders, chest, back, abdomen, and legs, while keeping the result believable for each subject's build and pose. Preserve their recognizable identity, face, age range, expression, skin tone, hairstyle, clothing style, accessories, pose, and position. Adapt only the targeted subjects' clothing fit naturally to their enhanced physique without changing the outfit design. Maintain anatomically correct proportions, natural skin texture, realistic fabric tension, consistent lighting, shadows, perspective, original background, and photorealistic image quality. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the identified target subjects only; leave untargeted people and their bodies unchanged. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: muscular untargeted people, changed untargeted people, exaggerated bodybuilder proportions, oversized muscles, unnatural muscle definition, distorted anatomy, malformed anatomy, unrealistic proportions, deformed body, changed identity, face swap, altered face, altered age, altered skin tone, altered expression, changed outfit design, nudity, exposed body not present in source, plastic skin, extra people, missing people, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, extra arms, extra legs, extra limbs, extra fingers, broken hands, fused fingers, cropped body, cut-off face, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation of a target, identity drift, low quality, blurry, noise, pixelation, artifacts, incoherent perspective, floating objects, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. target the person in the red shirt, subtle athletic build...
